ReportTemplate.Name: Room Occupancy
ReportTemplate.QuerySQL: SELECT RoomID, COUNT(*) FROM BookingRoom GROUP BY RoomID

ReportTemplate.Name: Top Customers
ReportTemplate.QuerySQL: SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY CustomerID

ReportTemplate.Name: Sales by Service
ReportTemplate.QuerySQL: SELECT ServiceItemID, SUM(Quantity) FROM ServiceOrderDetail GROUP BY ServiceItemID

ReportTemplate.Name: Staff Performance
ReportTemplate.QuerySQL: SELECT EmployeeID, AVG(MetricValue) FROM PerformanceLog GROUP BY EmployeeID

ReportTemplate.Name: Utility Cost
ReportTemplate.QuerySQL: SELECT BranchID, SUM(Value)*Rate FROM UtilityReading JOIN UtilityMeter ...
